summary: Frontend regression test of Swiss minimalist redesign on /target-planning/{planId}. Verified 3 plans (run_rate ACTIVE 7a23..., cumulative DRAFT 2c22..., 6-mo DRAFT 813f... with 5 territories). All key flows work: CombinedProgressWidget renders (TotalTarget, Elapsed/Remaining/Total Days, Time Elapsed progress bar, milestones markers), Cumulative MRR section renders Achieved/Remaining/Achievement, MonthlyPerformanceTable for run_rate works, TerritoryCard + CityAllocationRow render with progress + Allocated/Achieved, Add Territory dialog opens (when budget available), Add City dialog reachable, city drawer (Sheet) opens with Resources/SKUs tabs both clickable, MonthlyAllocation City x Month matrix renders with editable cells - typing 1000 into ma-cell updates ma-row-allocated and ma-row-balance live, summary band Total Target/Allocated/Balance/Status updates, Submit Allocation remains disabled while Unbalanced. Status buttons render correctly: DRAFT shows Publish Plan (publish-plan-detail-btn), ACTIVE shows Mark Completed + Revert to Draft (rendered text, no testid). No JS runtime/console errors (only 401s on unauth probes which are pre-login standard). Data NOT corrupted - no Save Draft clicked; existing plan data intact.
action_items: MINOR (non-blocking, pre-existing): Mark Completed button (line 2143) and Revert to Draft button (line 2148) in TargetPlanDashboard.js lack data-testid attributes. Recommend adding data-testid="mark-completed-btn" and data-testid="revert-to-draft-btn" to support automated testing of ACTIVE plan status transitions.

MINOR (pre-existing): TerritoryCard root element lacks data-testid="territory-card-{id}" and Add City buttons lack data-testid="add-city-btn-{territoryId}". Not regressions from this redesign but useful additions.
critical_code_review_comments: TargetPlanDashboard.js is ~2191 lines and houses 8+ inner components. Recommend splitting CombinedProgressWidget, MonthlyPerformanceTable, TerritoryCard, CityAllocationRow, AllocationItemWithProgress, CityAllocationDetailDialog, HierarchicalAllocationSection and MonthlyAllocationTab into their own files under src/pages/target-plan/ or src/components/target-plan/ for maintainability.
No errors observed; the cleanup of unused imports (Progress, Clock, Trophy, Medal, X, Calendar) and removal of getRankStyle is clean.
seed_data_creation: None. Edited a single monthly-allocation cell in-memory to 1000 then attempted to restore; never clicked Save Draft so no DB persistence occurred. Plan 813fbe91 remains in its original state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Swiss redesign verified visually + functionally. Key live-update test: type into ma-cell-* triggers ma-row-allocated-*, ma-row-balance-*, and the summary band band update. Submit Allocation stays disabled when status=Unbalanced. Two minor missing data-testid (mark-completed-btn, revert-to-draft-btn) noted but pre-existing and out of scope for visual redesign.
rca of the issue: No bug encountered. Redesign introduced no functional regression.
